ops.text: LANE B PROTOCOL (task aade0a1c — strip Claude Code baseline from judge calls; registered before measurement). Workspace /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-wb @ main 81b123bb. CHANGE: cc_steer/claude.py cached_judge's ClaudeConfig gains max_turns=1, tools="", disable_slash_commands=True, mirroring run_claude's minimal harness; output_format omitted because spawnllm's schema path (backends/claude.py:136) already forces --output-format json and ignores cfg.output_format whenever response_model is set (always, for cached_judge). IDENTITY VERIFIED SAFE: triage verdicts upsert on (dedup_key, role, prompt_version) — tests/test_store.py:306 pins model as provenance-not-identity; no harness field participates in verdict identity, prompt text unchanged → NO PROMPT_VERSION/AUDIT_VERSION/REFINE bumps. MEASUREMENT (mirrors WF-A item 2 controlled method): fresh cp -c clone of _base-20260719/feedback.db → ~/.cc-steer/experiments/BSTRIP/clones/; first n=14 summary-fidelity frozen-context rows by e.id (deterministic; same population item2_floor's 0.750 floor was computed on); model sonnet (tier medium), conc 6, timeout 180; PATH-first WFA capture shim writes every raw envelope to BSTRIP/captures/. Arms share the identical JUDGE_USER-rendered prompt; only ClaudeConfig differs: OLD = main's cached_judge (system_prompt=JUDGE_SYSTEM only), NEW = patch (+ max_turns=1, tools="", disable_slash_commands=True). Passes: warm_old + warm_new (row 0, primes both system caches), then old_a, new_c, old_b (in-run self-agreement replicate). SHIP GATE: mean usd/row NEW < OLD AND mean tokens/row (input+cache_read+cache_creation) NEW < OLD; equivalence on matched rows = old-vs-new category agreement >= 0.750 (item2_floor.json floor) AND accept (is_steering) old-vs-new agreement >= in-run old-vs-old accept agreement. A gate miss = early_return with data, no ship. Spend cap $10, all calls behind ccp env.
